site.title: Online Ruler — Free Screen Measurement Tool | RulerKit
site.description: Measure anything on your screen with RulerKit's accurate online ruler. Supports cm, inches, mm, and pixels. Free, no install, works on any device.
tools.ruler.name: Online Ruler
tools.ruler.shortDescription: Measure in cm, inches, and mm
tools.ruler.description: A precise, calibrated on-screen ruler that measures real-world objects in centimeters, inches, and millimeters. Supports horizontal and vertical orientations with credit card calibration.
tools.ruler.metaTitle: Online Ruler — Actual Size Measurements in cm, inches & mm
tools.ruler.metaDescription: Free online ruler with actual size measurements. Calibrate with a credit card and measure any object directly on your screen. Supports cm, inches, and mm.
tools.pixelRuler.name: Pixel Ruler
tools.pixelRuler.description: Click and drag to measure pixel-perfect distances between any two points on your screen. Ideal for UI design, web development, and layout verification.
tools.pixelRuler.metaTitle: Pixel Ruler — Measure Screen Distances Online
tools.pixelRuler.metaDescription: Free online pixel ruler. Click to measure distances between elements on your screen in pixels, cm, or inches. Perfect for designers and developers.
tools.protractor.name: Online Protractor
tools.protractor.description: Measure any angle directly on your screen with this precise online protractor. Supports 0-360 degree measurements with adjustable rotation.
tools.protractor.metaTitle: Online Protractor — Measure Angles on Your Screen
tools.protractor.metaDescription: Free online protractor. Measure angles of any object directly on your screen. Accurate to 1 degree. No installation required.
tools.printableRuler.name: Printable Ruler
tools.printableRuler.description: Generate and download printable rulers in inches and centimeters. Print at actual size for a physical ruler when you need one. Multiple templates available.
tools.printableRuler.metaTitle: Printable Ruler — Free PDF Ruler Templates to Download
tools.printableRuler.metaDescription: Download free printable rulers in cm and inches. Print at actual size for a precise physical ruler. Multiple template styles available in PDF format.
tools.ringSizer.name: Ring Sizer
tools.ringSizer.shortDescription: Find your ring size at home
tools.ringSizer.description: Determine your ring size by placing an existing ring on the screen or measuring your finger. Supports US, UK, EU, and JP sizing standards.
tools.ringSizer.metaTitle: Ring Sizer — Find Your Ring Size Online
tools.ringSizer.metaDescription: Free online ring sizer. Determine your ring size by measuring an existing ring or your finger. Supports US, UK, EU, and JP size charts.
tools.lSquare.name: L-Square
tools.lSquare.description: An L-shaped try square with simultaneous X and Y axis measurement. Perfect for comparing width and height of objects, images, and screen elements.
tools.lSquare.metaTitle: L-Square — Online XY Coordinate Measurement Tool
tools.lSquare.metaDescription: Free online L-square tool. Measure both width and height simultaneously with this XY coordinate ruler. Great for design and layout work.
tools.measureImage.name: Measure Image
tools.measureImage.description: Upload any image, calibrate with a known reference, and take precise real-world measurements. Add labels, resize, and export your annotated image as PNG.
tools.measureImage.metaTitle: Measure Image — Upload, Calibrate & Annotate Online
tools.measureImage.metaDescription: Free online image measurement tool. Upload a photo, set a calibration reference, and measure real-world dimensions. Export annotated images as PNG.
measureImage.drop: Drop an image here or click to browse
measureImage.uploadHint: Supports JPG, PNG, WebP — up to 20MB
measureImage.calibrate.hint: Click two points to define a known distance
measureImage.calibrate.enterLength: Enter the real-world distance between your two points
tools.unitConverter.name: Unit Converter
tools.unitConverter.shortDescription: Convert between cm, inches, mm, pixels
tools.unitConverter.description: Quickly convert measurements between centimeters, inches, millimeters, and pixels. Perfect for design, printing, and everyday measurement conversions.
tools.unitConverter.metaTitle: Unit Converter — Convert cm, inches, mm & pixels Online
tools.unitConverter.metaDescription: Free online unit converter for length measurements. Instantly convert between centimeters, inches, millimeters, and pixels. No sign-up required.
calibration.title: Calibrate Your Screen
calibration.description: For accurate measurements, calibrate the ruler to your screen.
calibration.placeCard: Place a standard credit card on the blue guide below
calibration.adjustSlider: Adjust the slider until the guide matches your card
calibration.enterDiagonal: Enter your screen diagonal in inches
guides.title: Measurement Guides
guides.description: Learn how to measure accurately with online tools
blog.title: RulerKit Blog
blog.description: Tips, tutorials, and insights about measurement tools
home.hero.title: The Most Accurate Online Ruler
home.hero.subtitle: Measure anything on your screen — no app download, no install, no sign-up required.
home.features.title: Why RulerKit?
home.features.accurate.desc: Calibrated to your specific screen for ±0.5mm precision
home.features.multitool.desc: Ruler, pixel ruler, protractor, ring sizer, and more
home.features.privacy.desc: Everything runs in your browser. Nothing is stored on servers.
home.features.offline.desc: Install as a PWA and measure even without internet
